name: Teton Crest (GTNP + Alaska Basin)
notes: Second cross-boundary region: Grand Teton camping zones (permit 4675342) plus Alaska Basin, which sits in Caribou-Targhee National Forest and needs no permit. Teton's payload ships zero coordinates, so all zone coords are anchored to OSM named features 2026-07-13 (Marion and Holly lakes, Fox Creek and Mount Meek passes, Sunset Lake); the first-pass memory-curated coords were off by up to 4 km and the geometry coverage validator caught it. Mileages are standard Teton Crest guide figures flagged est; gains come from the v2.4 DEM pass.

camps.name: AB - Alaska Basin
camps.note: Caribou-Targhee NF, no permit required; first-come. Coords approximate, QA queued.
